economic_notes: Nation has Treaty Benefits Claim against Government of Canada for damages. Land purchased in Lloydminster SK financed by RBC loan. Poundmaker Economic Development Holdings Limited Partnership formed 2017 with no activity in 2024. Cattle inventory held. Tire shop, meat shop, and Kanatinak Store operations.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence on accuracy, occurrence and classification of expenses. No budget was prepared for 2024. Nation has a Treaty Benefits Claim loan of $550,000 outstanding (Notes 13 and 15). Term loans subject to refinancing of $4,600,000 for Lloydminster land purchase classified separately. Three entities accounted for by modified equity method (GBEs): Poundmaker Economic Development Holdings LP, Kanatinak Store 2 Inc., 101119042 Saskatchewan Ltd. Five entities fully consolidated including CMHC Housing, Royalty Corporation, TLE Trust, West Arrow Development. Poundmaker Legacy Trust excluded from consolidation as Chief and Council do not control it. Prior year included $500,000 Class Action Settlement one-time item. Province should be SK (Saskatchewan) not AB.
